overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting exploration of an underground black market. The player character walks through neon-lit industrial corridors past clothing vendors, weapon displays, and holographic advertisements in a dystopian cyberpunk setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: clothing boutique entrance with LED-lit racks

events.description: character moves from clothing rack area toward mannequin display
ambient lighting shifts from warm red to cooler blue tones as entering main corridor

agents.ego_description: walking past clothing racks and faceless mannequins while exploring the market entrance

notable_agents.action: vendor in tactical gear standing near clothing display

entered.detail: metal clothing rack with green LED strip lighting displaying jackets and pants
skin-colored humanoid mannequins standing on platform display
stack of monitors showing blue error screens

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow corridor of an underground market, focusing on a clothing rack illuminated by green LED strips. Faceless mannequins stand on display to the left as the camera moves forward, transitioning from warm red lighting to cooler blue tones near the corridor entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: main market corridor with digital displays

events.description: entering wider main corridor with stacked blue monitor displays
crowd density increases near food stall area with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking through the central market corridor past various stalls and NPC shoppers

notable_agents.action: female pedestrian in shorts walking ahead of camera

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with 'BIG' text in orange neon
floating digital billboard displaying product advertisements
circular neon sign with pink figure above food vendor

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a wider corridor lined with stacked blue monitors displaying error screens. Neon signs including a prominent 'BIG' sign illuminate the path ahead. The crowd density increases as the camera approaches a food stall area with a distinctive circular neon sign.

events.description: entering weapon market area with large holographic rifle floating overhead
dominant lighting shifts to green neon from weapon rack displays

agents.ego_description: walking through weapon market area, observing holographic displays and weapon crates

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing behind counter with arms crossed

entered.detail: large translucent holographic assault rifle floating above the market floor
stacked military crates containing weapons and equipment
vertical display rack with multiple rifles mounted under green LED lighting
stacks of orange and black ammunition crates on display tables

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide chamber dominated by a floating holographic rifle. The camera moves past weapon crates and ammunition boxes toward a wall-mounted rifle rack illuminated by green neon lights. The environment transitions from general market to specialized weapon bazaar.

scene_state.functional_zone: weapon display floor with seating area

events.description: camera turns right to examine wall-mounted rifle rack up close
moving from weapon displays toward seating and bar area

agents.ego_description: examining weapon displays on floor and walls, then moving toward seating area

notable_agents.action: armed guard standing near weapon crates

entered.detail: curved leather bench seating with illuminated base lighting
long counter with red LED strip lighting and weapon displays on top
desktop computer with multiple monitors showing maps and data

segments.scene_description: The camera turns to examine a wall-mounted rifle rack up close, showing detailed weapon models under green lighting. The scene transitions past piles of weapons on the floor toward a seating area with leather booths and a bar counter illuminated by red lights.

events.description: approaching final market stall with green wall mural

agents.ego_description: walking through final corridor section past seated NPCs toward market exit

notable_agents.action: seated customer at bar counter wearing mask

entered.detail: large painted mural with abstract green and yellow design on concrete wall
wall covered with various advertisements and graffiti posters

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera moving through a corridor with a distinctive green wall mural on the left. The scene passes the last market stalls and seating areas, with various posters and advertisements visible on the right wall as the exploration continues toward the exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a subterranean black market that evolves from a narrow clothing alley into a sprawling weapon bazaar and lounge. It begins in a tight corridor beside green LED-lit clothing racks and faceless mannequins, with the lighting shifting from warm red to cool blue as the path opens. As the camera advances, the space expands into a wider thoroughfare lined with glitching blue monitors and neon signs before flowing into a vast chamber dominated by a floating holographic rifle and crates of ammunition. The perspective then turns to examine detailed weapon racks under green neon lights before gliding past piles of arms toward a red-lit seating area with leather booths and a bar. Finally, the scene transitions through a corridor featuring a green wall mural and various advertisements as the camera moves past the remaining stalls toward the exit.
